/usr/bin/c++  -O2 -march=x86-64-v3 CMakeFiles/cinecpp-gui.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cinecpp-gui.dir/src/gui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cinecpp-gui.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cinecpp-gui.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cinecpp-gui.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cinecpp-gui.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cinecpp-gui.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cinecpp-gui.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdl2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cinecpp-gui.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o cinecpp-gui  libcinecpp_core.a -lSDL2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
